'''''Cavalcade''''' was an [[HT-2200 medium freighter]] used by the [[BloodScar]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]]. [[Shakko]] was its captain and [[Tannis (pirate)|Tannis]] was its pilot. [[Vickers]] and [[Bisc]] were other crew members. [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] infiltrated the ship and was forced to kill Shakko. She commandeered the ship in order to continue the mission.

==Appearances==
*[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
